title: TSE Network and System Penetration Testing Specialist
description: An official certification issued by the Turkish Standards Institution, validating my expertise in network and system security through penetration testing practices.

title: Ethical Hacking Essentials
description: Ethical Hacking Essentials (EHE) is an entry-level certification by EC-Council that provides fundamental knowledge and skills in penetration testing and ethical hacking.

title: CompTIA Pentest+ (TryHackMe)
description: CompTIA PenTest+ (TryHackMe) is a hands-on penetration testing course focused on teaching mid-level offensive security skills through practical scenarios and methodologies.
